title: A few questions
wikitext:
[]: A few questions             Quote Post by zarwin » Sun Aug 17, 2008 1:37 am All right, first off, and this has been bugging me for awhile, hat was Asuka's Synch ratio right before her death? It was less than 400%, we know that you become tanged at this point. For awhile I thought it was just a perfect 100%, but I'm not so sure now. I recently got the Platinum Perfect edition, and a few ties I've head things like, "Cut synch ratio back to 60%" in order to protect the pilot. This makes me think that the synch ratio is significantly higher, as if it was close to 60%, what difference would it make? So, basically, I'm asking at what point will you have your arm cut in half? Next, at the end f the TV show, Shinji rejects instrumentality, and his friends are all clapping, which I thought meant he was the last person to free himself, but EoE has him coming out first, with Asuka following after a while. Why is there this inconsistency, or did I just make it up in my head? I'm also a little confused as to the choking at the end of EoE. Was it just a continuation of the coffee scene earlier? Got another one. Yui, why wasn't she part of instrumentality? Or was she, and she just freed herself before Shinji? and, if so, why would she come out as Eva, and not in her original form? Just a few more, How would causing the third impact reunite Gendo with Yui? I've never understood this. Ok, I'm almost done, I swear. When the Lance of Longinus came back from the moon(?) why didn't Shinji do anything? Or, even before that, when he saw what happened to unit 02? Last one. Why did Asuka have bandages on at the end of EoE? If you pulled yourself out of Instrumentality, wouldn't you be able to heal your body as you came out? I sort of already have an answer for this, but it's mostly fanwanking, so a better answer would be appreciated.

[]: Re: A few questions             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Aug 17, 2008 2:37 am zarwin wrote: All right, first off, and this has been bugging me for awhile, hat was Asuka's Synch ratio right before her death? It was less than 400%, we know that you become tanged at this point.

It was less than 400%, we know that you become tanged at this point. For awhile I thought it was just a perfect 100%, but I'm not so sure now. I recently got the Platinum Perfect edition, and a few ties I've head things like, "Cut synch ratio back to 60%" in order to protect the pilot. This makes me think that the synch ratio is significantly higher, as if it was close to 60%, what difference would it make? So, basically, I'm asking at what point will you have your arm cut in half?

[]: Re: A few questions             Quote Post by zarwin » Sun Aug 17, 2008 10:01 pm Sachi_13 wrote: Not sure, but it must've been damn high.

[]: Re: A few questions             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Aug 17, 2008 10:11 pm zarwin wrote: Sachi_13 wrote: Not sure, but it must've been damn high.

[]: Re: A few questions             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Aug 17, 2008 10:24 pm zarwin wrote: why didn't she come back in her original state?

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Sun Aug 17, 2008 10:27 pm Well of course, but HOW high?

[]: Re: A few questions             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Aug 18, 2008 12:31 am zarwin wrote: All right, first off, and this has been bugging me for awhile, hat was Asuka's Synch ratio right before her death? It was less than 400%, we know that you become tanged at this point.

[]: Re: A few questions             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Aug 18, 2008 2:29 am NemZ wrote: 2) When she rematerialized and her self-image created the plugsuit and bandages because that's how she expected to be, say if she woke up in a hospital after somehow surviving that mess.
